title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at SAP India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at SAP India
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!
